raw_cv_text:
Santi Lin
+1 (415) 829-3647 | Email: santi.lin@gmail.com | LinkedIn: santi-lin | GitHub: SantiLin | https://santilin.dev
EDUCATION
University of Michigan | B.S. in Computer Science 2019 - 2023
Achieved Dean's List honors all 4 semesters with 3.87 GPA in Computer Science
Led UI/UX design workshop for 200+ students through ACM Michigan chapter
Georgia Institute of Technology | Professional Certificate in Full-Stack Web Development 2023 - 2024
Completed advanced bootcamp with focus on React, Node.js, and cloud architecture
Ranked top 8% among 500+ participants in capstone project competition
EXPERIENCE
Figma | Frontend Engineer II Jan 2024 - Present
Optimized component library rendering pipeline reducing bundle size by 34% and improving page load time by 1.8
seconds for 2M+ users
Implemented real-time collaborative features using WebSocket architecture, decreasing team latency by 62% and enabling
15+ simultaneous collaborators
Mentored 2 junior engineers on advanced React patterns and component architecture, resulting in 40% faster onboarding
Stripe | Senior Frontend Engineer Aug 2022 - Dec 2023
Redesigned payment dashboard UI increasing merchant conversion rate by 28% through A/B testing across 50K+ test
users
Led migration of legacy Angular codebase to modern React/TypeScript stack across 12 projects, reducing technical debt
by 45%
Established frontend performance monitoring framework using Sentry and DataDog, reducing production bugs by 56%
quarter-over-quarter
Notion | Frontend Engineer Mar 2021 - Jul 2022
Built responsive database UI component library with 18 reusable components, accelerating feature development by 35%
Decreased initial page load from 4.2s to 1.9s through code-splitting and lazy loading optimization for 5M+ daily active
users
Collaborated with design team to implement accessibility improvements (WCAG 2.1 AA compliance), increasing
accessibility audit score by 41%
PROJECTS
FlowState - Collaborative Code Editor | React, TypeScript, WebSocket, Monaco Editor, Node.js, Jun 2023 - Sep 2023
PostgreSQL
Engineered real-time code synchronization with operational transformation algorithm supporting 12+ concurrent users
without conflicts
Achieved 99.2% uptime with auto-scaling infrastructure on AWS Lambda, handling 500+ peak concurrent sessions
DesignSystem - Open Source React UI Library | React, Storybook, Jest, TypeScript, CSS-in-JS Jan 2023 - Present
Published 45+ production-ready components with comprehensive documentation, accumulating 12K+ GitHub stars and
850+ weekly npm downloads
Implemented automated visual regression testing reducing manual QA time by 73% across 200+ component variants
AnalyticsPro - Real-time Dashboard Platform | Next.js, TailwindCSS, Chart.js, Redux, Firebase Aug 2022 - Nov 2022
Built data visualization dashboard processing 2M+ events daily with sub-100ms query response times using optimized
indexing
Reduced front-end rendering time by 68% through React memo, useMemo hooks, and virtualization of large datasets
LocalStack - Developer Tools Browser Extension | Chrome Extension API, React, TypeScript, Feb 2022 - May 2022
IndexedDB
Created productivity browser extension with 2K+ active users, delivering 15+ development utility features with zero
performance overhead
Implemented offline-first architecture using IndexedDB, enabling 98% feature functionality without internet connection
EXTRACURRICULAR
React Community Conference | Speaker & Panelist 2023 - Present
Delivered 2 keynote talks on 'Advanced React Performance Optimization' reaching 1,200+ live attendees and 45K+
YouTube views
Mentored 8 early-career frontend engineers through structured 6-week open-source contribution program
Frontend Architects GitHub Organization | Core Maintainer 2022 - Present
Maintained 5 open-source projects with 250K+ combined npm downloads and reviewed 180+ community pull requests
Triaged and resolved 95% of issues within 48 hours, maintaining 4.8/5 community satisfaction rating
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, GraphQL
Technologies – React, Next.js, Redux, Vue.js, Webpack, Babel, WebSocket, REST APIs, Material-UI, TailwindCSS
Tools – Git, GitHub, VS Code, Figma, Chrome DevTools, Jest, React Testing Library, Storybook, Docker, AWS, Sentry
name: Santi Lin +1

projects.subtitle: React, TypeScript, WebSocket, Monaco Editor, Node.js
